name: engineering-baseline
description: Repository baseline for language-agnostic semantic design and test-driven work: constrained domain values, closed variants and failures, typestate, executable-check TDD, marketplace onboarding, and instruction hygiene.

metadata.dailyDriver: Install in repositories that should apply language-agnostic semantic design, consume curated agent tooling, use shell-invokable red-green proof, and enforce baseline instruction hygiene.
metadata.notFor: Language-specific semantic tooling, Pkl engineering, Git or CI delivery and release babysitting, or API contract authoring.
metadata.scope: Default repository guardrails, language-agnostic semantic design, bounded variants, closed failures, typestate, schema-driven boundaries, executable-check TDD, marketplace onboarding, and turn-level skill-read enforcement.
